summary: The Go unit test suite run with the race detector (`-race`) produced 3 failures out of 7346 tests: two data races detected by the runtime and one test assertion mismatch in `app_test.go`. The `make test-race-local` target exited with error code 1 as a result.
root_cause: Two concurrent data races were detected by the Go race detector during execution of tests (one in a server/TLS test around 03:27:12 and one around 03:29:38), and a third failure is a test assertion mismatch ('Not equal') at cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go:1936. The make target test-race-local failed because of these three test failures.

evidence.reason: Confirms exactly 3 test failures in the race-enabled test run.
The make target for race-enabled unit tests exited non-zero, confirming the CI job failure.

evidence.quote:
WARNING: DATA RACE
    testing.go:1712: race detected during execution of test
evidence.reason: Go race detector identified a data race during test execution; appears twice in the log, accounting for two of the three failures.

evidence.quote:
=== Failed
    app_test.go:1936: 
        	Error Trace:	/home/runner/work/argo-cd/argo-cd/cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go:1936
        	Error:      	Not equal:
evidence.reason: Explicit test assertion failure at app_test.go line 1936 — the third failure.
Pinpoints the exact file and line of the assertion failure.

suggested_fix: Investigate the data race reported around the server/TLS test at 03:27:12 (likely in a server package test that spawns goroutines without proper synchronisation) and the race at 03:29:38 (in a helm/util test), and fix the assertion mismatch at cmd/argocd/commands/app_test.go:1936 by reviewing recent changes to that test or its subject code.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
